userApprovals.title: User approvals
userApprovals.description: Review registrations in your scope. Approving activates the account; rejecting records the decision. All statuses are listed below.

filters.title: Filter approvals
filters.description: Filter by organization and unit name.

userApprovals.emptyDepartmentManager: No users found for your registered organizational unit.
userApprovals.emptyNoUnit: Your account is not linked to an organizational unit, so you cannot review registrations here.

toast.approvedDescription: The account can now sign in.
toast.rejectedDescription: The request was dismissed. The user remains unable to sign in.

dashboard.viewScheduleBy: View schedule by year, month, week, or department
dashboard.aiOptimizationBody: AI can complete the remaining {{percent}}% in seconds, respecting constraints.

smart.pendingDescription: Approve now to publish and notify staff.
smart.gapsDescription: Fill open slots to keep service continuity.
smart.optimizeDescription: Run AI suggestions to complete the schedule.

schedules.noScheduleAccessForRegistration: No schedules are linked to your account for this view (e.g. outpatient registration).
schedules.noUnitsLoaded: No units available for this view yet.

swapModal.title: Schedule Change Request
swapModal.description: Would you like to request a change to swap {{staffFrom}}'s schedule with {{staffTo}}'s schedule?
swapModal.incidentCreated: Shift swap incident has been created successfully.
swapModal.appliedImmediately: Swap applied and saved to the schedule.
swapModal.crossDeptConflict: This swap involves more than one other department. Cancel and handle it as separate requests.
swapModal.saveScheduleFirst: Save the schedule to the server before requesting a cross-department swap.
swapModal.pendingPeerApproval: Request recorded. The other department’s manager must approve it under Shift changes before the grid updates.
swapModal.savedToShiftChanges: Request saved under Shift changes. Approve it there to apply the swap to the schedule.

schedules.slotChangePending: Swap pending — approve under Shift changes
schedules.noAvailableStaffForSpecialty: No available staff match the selected specialization.
schedules.noAvailableStaffForUnit: No available staff found for this unit.
schedules.assignEmptySlotHint: Click to assign a staff member to this slot
schedules.assignStaffSaved: {{name}} has been assigned and the schedule was saved.
schedules.assignStaffNoEligible: No eligible staff for this slot (specialty, availability, or already assigned here).
schedules.assignNoShiftTemplate: This unit has no enabled shift template for this category. Enable a shift in Units → Dimensioning.
schedules.dragToSwap: Drag onto another assigned shift to swap staff
schedules.dynamicScheduleDescription: Real-time schedule — updated with extra shifts, swaps, and adjustments.
schedules.staticScheduleDescription: Staff commitments based on registered shift preferences — read-only reference.
schedules.staticNoProfileShifts: No staff have configured shift preferences for this unit.
schedules.dimensioningHeadcountTitle: Required headcount from unit dimensioning (this shift category)
schedules.noRequiredSlots: No staffing slots required for this shift

incidents.pageSubtitle: Track, resolve, and audit all schedule incidents

descriptions.unplannedAbsence: Unplanned absence - night shift. Awaiting substitute assignment.
descriptions.shiftSwapApproved: Mutual swap request for Mar 5. Both parties approved.
descriptions.plannedAbsence: Planned absence - medical appointment. Substitute: Maria Santos.
descriptions.coverageGap: Night shift gap detected by autopilot. AI suggesting 3 substitutes.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: System configuration, integrations, and user management
settings.languageDescription: Choose your preferred language for the application

units.deleteConfirm: Delete this unit? All schedules for this unit will be removed, staff assigned to this unit will be deleted, and users registered for this unit will be unlinked. This cannot be undone.
units.deleteErrorSchedules: Could not remove schedules for this unit: {{message}}
units.deleteErrorStaff: Could not remove staff for this unit: {{message}}
units.deleteErrorStaffLoad: Could not load staff to update allowed units: {{message}}
units.deleteErrorAllowedUnits: Could not update staff allowed units: {{message}}
units.deleteErrorUserAccounts: Could not unlink user accounts from this unit: {{message}}

form.title: Create Unit
form.organizationHelp: Every unit should be linked to a managing organization.
form.organizationRemoved: Organization not in list (removed or deactivated)
form.noOrganizations: No organizations found. Register one under Configuration → Organizations.
form.rtSectionHint: Legally responsible physician for the health unit.
form.specialtiesCatalogEmpty: No specialties found. Run the SQL migration supabase/medical_specialties_table.sql in Supabase and set RLS policies.

outpatientUnits.pageSubtitle: Manage outpatient organizational units and locations
outpatientUnits.deleteConfirm: Delete this outpatient unit? Users registered for this unit will be unlinked. This cannot be undone.

form.description: Select one department and add multiple specialty rows with work window and required staff count.

form.title: Create Staff
form.name: Name
form.allowedUnitsDescription: Select where this professional can work.
form.shiftSchedulesDescription: Set day, shift type, and recurrence.
form.specialtiesDescription: Select all specialties this professional can cover.
form.allowedShiftTypesDescription: Choose which shift windows are allowed.
form.blockedDaysDescription: Days this professional cannot be scheduled.

table.name: Name
table.empty: No team members match the current filters.

validation.fullNameRequired: Please provide full name (first and last).
validation.cpfInvalid: CPF must be 11 digits, or leave the field empty.
validation.duplicateShift: Duplicate shift schedule: same day, shift type, schedule, start time, and bi-weekly date.
validation.biweeklyDateRequired: When A/B bi-weekly is selected, set the first bi-weekly date.

delete.title: Confirm deletion
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.

toast.savedWithoutCpf: Staff saved. CPF was not stored — your database is missing the cpf column. In Supabase: SQL → run the script supabase/staff_members_add_cpf.sql, then edit this person again to save CPF.

fintech.emptyScopedProfessionals: No professionals match your organization’s units in this demo dataset.
fintech.noMatches: No rows match the current filters.
fintech.scopedNoneHint: Financial analysis for your account is only available when you are registered to an urgent-care unit linked to this module.

orgProfessionals.subtitle: Professionals linked to your organization’s units (primary unit or cross-unit access).
orgProfessionals.empty: No professionals were found for your organization’s units.

reference.weekendDesc: Applied when date is weekend or listed holiday.

fintech.footerHint: Use this module to reconcile shift values before invoice generation.

governance.organizationManagerCannotCreateOrg: Organization managers cannot create new organizations. Contact a system administrator.
governance.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or short name...

ps1.name: SUS Municipal
ps1.description: Default municipal rates for schedule billing.

form.name: Full name
form.activeHelp: Inactive organizations are hidden in selectors.

errors.organizationsTableMissing: Table public.organizations was not found. Run the SQL in supabase/organizations_table.sql, then reload this page.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.description: Recent governance operations performed in this session.

jobOpenings.title: Job Openings Available
jobOpenings.subtitle: Request openings at your unit and other units in the same organization

empty.title: No openings found
empty.description: Adjust filters to see more options

info.title: How does it work?
info.description: Openings are calculated from each unit’s workforce sizing (dimensioning) minus staff who are available for that unit, specialty, and shift type. The list refreshes every hour. After requesting, wait for the unit manager approval.

dialog.title: Request Opening
dialog.description: Confirm your request for this shift
dialog.warning: Your request will be sent to the unit manager for approval. You will receive a notification when there is a response.

blocked.alreadyOnSchedule: You are already on the schedule for this unit on this date. You cannot request another shift the same day.
blocked.sixHourOnly: Someone is already booked for this specialty on this date. Only a Cinderella (shorter) shift can be requested.

toast.requestSuccess: Request recorded. It appears under Shift Changes.
toast.requestError: Could not save your request. Try again.
toast.signInRequired: Sign in to request an opening.
toast.requestNotAllowed: This request is not allowed under the current schedule rules.

table.title: Requests
table.description: Manage shift swaps, declines and confirmations

jobOpening.approveError: Could not approve this job opening request.
jobOpening.rejectError: Could not reject this job opening request.

scheduleSwap.approveError: Could not approve this schedule swap.

form.noStaffForUnit: No staff linked to this unit
form.notificationDescription: The unit manager will be notified via WhatsApp as soon as the request is submitted.

new.title: New Request
new.description: Register a swap, decline or confirmation

empty.title: No requests found
empty.description: Adjust filters or create a new request

defaults.autoReasonDeptManager: Request submitted by department manager (unit-assigned; configure details per unit policy).

auth.welcomeDescription: Access your account to manage schedules, view shifts, and track real-time metrics.
auth.footerBrand: Medical scheduling with intelligence and traceability
auth.registerSubtitle: Register your user with role permissions
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your e-mail to receive a reset link
auth.resetSubtitle: Create a new password for your account
auth.unitEmpty: No units are available yet. Ask an administrator to register units first.
auth.organizationEmpty: No organizations are available yet. Ask an administrator to register organizations first.

errors.missingUserTable: Table public.user_accounts was not found. Run SQL from supabase/user_accounts_table.sql.
errors.systemAdminRoleNotEnabled: System Administrator role is not enabled in your current database constraint. Run supabase/user_accounts_add_system_administrator_role.sql, then try again.
errors.passwordTooWeak: Password must have at least 8 characters.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your e-mail before signing in.
errors.passwordReuse: Use a different password from the previous one.
errors.invalidRedirectConfig: Password reset redirect URL is not allowed in Supabase settings.
errors.resetRateLimited: Too many reset requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.emailRateLimited: Too many authentication emails were sent. Please wait several minutes, then try again (sign-up, confirmation, and password reset all count toward this limit).
errors.emailDeliveryFailed: Could not send the confirmation e-mail. This usually means the e-mail provider is rate-limiting or misconfigured. Please try again later or contact the administrator.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid e-mail address.
errors.recoverySessionExpired: Recovery session expired. Request a new reset link.
errors.network: Database connection failed. Please verify Supabase connectivity and try again.
errors.accountPendingApproval: Your registration is pending administrator approval. You will be able to sign in after it is approved.

success.registeredPleaseLogin: Registration successful. Please sign in with your email and password.
success.registeredPleaseLoginOrConfirm: Registration successful. Check your e-mail for confirmation if requested, then sign in.
success.resetLinkSent: If an account exists for this e-mail, we sent a link to reset your password. Check your inbox and spam folder.
success.resetLinkAlreadySent: Too many e-mails were sent recently. Wait a few minutes, then try again.
success.recoveryValidated: Recovery link validated. Set your new password.
success.passwordUpdated: Password updated successfully. Please sign in.
success.emailConfirmedSignIn: E-mail confirmed. You can sign in with your password below.

placeholder.liveMonitor: Real-time shift monitoring and alerts — coming soon.
placeholder.reports: Schedule analytics, compliance reports, and audit trails — coming soon.
placeholder.aiCopilot: Coverage suggestions, what-if simulations, and intelligent substitutions — coming soon.
placeholder.fintech: Shift-based billing, pre-invoicing, and financial impact auditing — coming soon.
placeholder.governance: RBAC, audit trails, versioning, and compliance controls — coming soon.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Alerts from your operation — swaps, feedback, attendance and reminders.

push.title: Mobile notifications
push.subtitle: Get alerts on this device even when the app is closed.
push.unsupported: This device/browser doesn't support push notifications. Tip: install the app to your home screen first.
push.deniedHint: Notifications are blocked. Allow them in your browser settings to enable.

score.title: Scoring & stars
score.subtitle: Define your operation's scoring criteria. Each company can set its own.
score.lateDiscountHint: Amount deducted on the 3rd late arrival of the month. Same for all clients.
score.customHint: Create your own criteria to award points manually. The system does not calculate them automatically — you apply them on the freelancer screen. Points may be negative.

pay.title: Default values
pay.subtitle: Values used when a restaurant does not set its own. Each restaurant can override these or follow them.
pay.weekendBonusHint: When active, whoever completes the mandatory weekend shifts is paid the bonus rate for every shift that week.

checkin.title: Location-based check-in
checkin.subtitle: Requires the freelancer to be near the restaurant to check in. Set each restaurant's location in its form.
checkin.radiusHint: Maximum distance from the restaurant to allow check-in. Default is 500 metres. Increase it where GPS is imprecise, such as inside malls.

ratingTypes.title: Customer rating types
ratingTypes.hint: Define the types coordination picks when validating a rating. Points can be negative for a bad review.

ratings.title: Customer ratings
ratings.subtitle: Validate the QR ratings received. They only score after you approve and pick a type.
ratings.noTypes: Add rating types in Settings before approving.

restaurants.title: Clients
restaurants.subtitle: Manage the venues, geofencing and per-client pay rules.
restaurants.name: Name
restaurants.empty: No clients yet. Add your first venue.
restaurants.shiftsPayHint: Add this restaurant's shifts. Give each a name (e.g. Shift 1), a time and a value. The bonus value is used when the shift is paid at the bonus rate.
restaurants.membersHint: Select who can work at this restaurant. They will see this client on their availability.
restaurants.errEndBeforeStart: End time must be after start time.
restaurants.errShiftIncomplete: Fill both start and end, or leave the shift empty.
restaurants.errInvalidAmount: Amounts must be zero or positive.
restaurants.errDuplicate: Identical shift times within the same period.
restaurants.locationHint: Used for location-based check-in. Tap use my location while at the restaurant, or fill in the coordinates. Without a location, the restaurant does not require proximity.
restaurants.geoError: Could not get the location. Check the browser permission.
restaurants.geoUnsupported: This device does not support location.
restaurants.errLatLngBoth: Fill in both latitude and longitude, or leave both empty.
restaurants.errLatLngRange: Latitude must be between -90 and 90 and longitude between -180 and 180.

freelancers.title: Team
freelancers.subtitle: Profiles, scores and star levels of members and visitors.

authEmails.title: Authorized emails
authEmails.hint: Register the person's email and pick their role. They sign up themselves on the login page using that email and set their own password — the role is decided here, not by them.

freelancers.emailHint: Used as the login. A temporary password is generated on creation.
freelancers.confirmDelete: Remove "{{name}}"? This deletes the account and its profile.
freelancers.tempPasswordNote: Share this temporary password with the member. They'll be asked to set a new one on first login.
freelancers.clientsHint: The member can only join activities for the selected clients.

score.title: Add points — {{name}}
score.hint: Add manual points (positive) to the freelancer's score. Respects the configured monthly cap.
score.criterionHint: This criterion applies a fixed value (may be negative). The reason is optional.
score.reasonPlaceholder: Why are these points being awarded?
score.invalidPoints: Enter a positive number of points.

qr.title: Rating QR — {{name}}
qr.hint: Print or download this QR so customers can rate the employee. Ratings are informational only and never affect the score.

publicRating.alreadyRatedBody: You have already rated this professional today. Thank you!

vagas.title: Open Shifts
vagas.subtitle: Shifts that opened up and you can take right now. Higher score gets priority in the first minutes.
vagas.empty: No open shifts for you right now. Keep your availability up to date to catch the next ones.
vagas.claimed: Shift confirmed! You're on the schedule. Points are granted after you work it.
vagas.hint: Taking a shift puts you straight on the schedule, no approval needed. Only take it if you're sure you can go.

availability.title: My Availability
availability.subtitle: Mark the shifts and clients you can work in
availability.subtitleOps: Open or close the availability window for the team to submit their shifts.
availability.closedNotice: The submission window is closed. Ask the coordinator to reopen it.
availability.noCycle: No availability cycle is open right now.
availability.anyHint: Choosing "any restaurant" earns you flexibility points and raises your chances of being scheduled.
availability.flexibleToast: Nice! You earned points for being flexible.
availability.unsaved: You have unsent changes. Click submit to confirm.
availability.reviewHint: Tip: select all and unmark only the days you can't, then submit.

manage.title: Manage availability window
manage.subtitle: Open, extend or close the window for freelancers to submit availability — at any time.
manage.opened: Window opened. Freelancers can now submit availability.
manage.invalidRange: The closing date must be on or after the opening date.
manage.pastWarning: The closing date is in the past — the window may auto-close. Use a future date.

demand.title: Base Schedule per Client
demand.subtitle: Set how many freelancers each client needs per shift (by contract) and adjust for special days.
demand.baseHint: Number of freelancers needed per weekday and shift.
demand.overridesHint: Overrides the base schedule on a specific date.

financial.title: Financial
financial.subtitle: Monthly payroll per freelancer: shifts worked, weekend bonus, and late/no-show discounts, broken down by client.
financial.tableHint: Click a freelancer to see the per-client breakdown and line items.
financial.empty: No entries this month. Publish schedules and record attendance to build payroll.
financial.adjGeneralHint: No specific client. Applies to the freelancer overall and shows under "All restaurants".
financial.adjPickRestaurant: Pick a client or mark it as a general adjustment.
financial.adjAmountHint: Use a positive value to add or a negative value to deduct.

scheduleBuilder.title: Schedule Builder
scheduleBuilder.subtitle: Assemble the monthly schedule: pick a day and client, fill each shift from available team members (ranked by score), watch demand deficits and publish.
scheduleBuilder.selectRestaurant: Select a client to start building the schedule.
scheduleBuilder.cycleCreated: Availability cycle created for this month.
scheduleBuilder.noCycle: No availability cycle exists for this month — create one so team members' availability can be loaded.
scheduleBuilder.bonusToggleHint: Mark this shift to pay the bonus rate
scheduleBuilder.noDemandSet: No base demand configured for this weekday/shift.
scheduleBuilder.noCandidates: No available team members for this slot.
scheduleBuilder.removedNotified: Removed. The person was notified and the slot reopened.
scheduleBuilder.conflictHint: Already assigned to another client in this shift.
scheduleBuilder.eligibilityWarning: Assigned, but this team member is not confirmed for all 4 weekend shifts of the previous weekend (weekday eligibility).
scheduleBuilder.publishConfirm: Publish the schedule changes? Only people who changed will be notified.
scheduleBuilder.publishedToast: Schedule published. Only people who changed were notified.
scheduleBuilder.autopilotResult: Autopilot: {{filled}} assigned · {{short}} still short · {{skipped}} conflicts skipped

placeholder.availability: Submit and review monthly availability (days 20–25). Coming soon.
placeholder.scheduling: Coordinator schedule builder with availability panel, conflict and deficit alerts. Coming soon.
placeholder.checkin: Geolocated check-in / check-out with lateness tracking. Coming soon.
placeholder.swaps: Request, accept and approve shift swaps. Coming soon.
placeholder.feedback: Manager star ratings, coordinator validation and categorization. Coming soon.
placeholder.performance: Accumulated score, star levels and history. Coming soon.
placeholder.financial: Monthly payroll, weekend bonus and discounts. Coming soon.
placeholder.mySchedule: Your published schedule and Google Calendar export. Coming soon.
placeholder.today: Today's schedule for your client. Coming soon.

auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: Access your SkalaUp account
auth.heroTitle: Manage your team's schedule with ease
auth.heroSubtitle: Availability, schedules, check-in and performance — all in one place.
auth.name: Full name
auth.pendingNotice: Account created! A coordinator must approve it before you can sign in.
auth.errPending: Your account is awaiting coordinator approval.
auth.errInactive: Your account is inactive. Contact the coordinator.
auth.errNotAuthorized: This email is not authorized. Ask the coordinator to enable your sign-up.
auth.invitedHint: Use the email coordination registered for you. Your role is already set there — here you only create your password.
auth.emailExists: An account with this email already exists. Try logging in or resetting your password.
auth.pixKeyPlaceholder: Email, phone, CPF or random key

perf.title: Schedule performance
perf.subtitle: Of the shifts that should have happened this month.
perf.empty: No shifts in the selected period.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: View and update your account details.
profile.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
profile.tempPasswordNotice: You're using a temporary password. Please set a new one.
profile.tempPasswordBanner: You're using a temporary password — set a new one to secure your account.
profile.photoHint: JPG or PNG, up to 5 MB.
profile.photoInvalid: Please choose a JPG or PNG image.

calendar.title: Export to Google Calendar
calendar.description: Subscribe to your schedule via a calendar link. Published shifts appear automatically in Google Calendar, Apple Calendar or Outlook and keep themselves up to date.
calendar.confirmRevoke: Revoke this link? The old link will stop working immediately.
calendar.instructions: Paste this link into Google Calendar → Other calendars → Subscribe from URL (or in Apple Calendar / Outlook: subscribe to calendar by URL).

mySchedule.title: My Schedule
mySchedule.subtitle: Your published shifts and Google Calendar export.
mySchedule.emptyUpcoming: You don't have any published shifts yet.

performance.title: My Performance
performance.subtitle: Your accumulated score, star level and history. Only you can see this.
performance.noLevel: No level yet — score cutoffs defined soon.

qr.title: Your rating QR
qr.hint: Show this QR so a customer can rate your service. You can download or print it.
qr.printCaption: Point the camera to rate the service

swaps.title: Shift Swaps
swaps.subtitleFreelancer: Request swaps, accept requests and track status.
swaps.subtitleOps: Track completed swaps. You can reject one if needed.
swaps.noShifts: You have no published shifts to swap.
swaps.noCandidates: No colleague free for this shift.
swaps.recentHint: Swaps accepted by colleagues take effect immediately. Reject one if needed.
swaps.bonusWarningBody: Swapping this shift cancels the weekend bonus for every shift this week.
swaps.bonusAck: I understand and want to continue
swaps.bonusAckRequired: Confirm you understand the bonus loss.

extraShifts.title: Extra Shift
extraShifts.subtitleManager: Request a shift beyond the base schedule (holiday, event). Coordination decides.
extraShifts.subtitleOps: Extra-shift requests from managers. Assign someone or open it as a vaga.
extraShifts.leadTimeError: Extra shifts require at least 48h notice.
extraShifts.assigned: Freelancer assigned to the extra shift.
extraShifts.noCandidates: No freelancer free for this shift.
extraShifts.inviteSent: Invite sent to the freelancer. Awaiting acceptance.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.subtitleManager: Rate freelancers at your restaurant (1–5 stars + justification).
feedback.subtitleOps: Validate and categorize feedback submitted by managers.
feedback.justificationHint: Required. Coordination validates and categorizes before scoring.
feedback.starsRequired: Give a rating of 1 to 5 stars.

approvals.title: User Approvals
approvals.subtitle: Approve or reject people who signed up.

attendance.title: Attendance & No-shows
attendance.subtitle: Record check-in/out, lateness and schedule no-shows. Payroll discounts are applied automatically.
attendance.noShifts: No shifts scheduled for this date.
attendance.markDialogDesc: An unjustified no-show applies a discount and a score penalty. A justified absence (certificate) has no discount and no score impact.
attendance.editDialogDesc: Use when the app failed or the battery died. Lateness is recomputed from the check-in time.

pending.title: Pending no-show decisions
pending.desc: 2nd unjustified no-show — decide whether to cancel the freelancer's remaining shifts (§5).

checkin.title: My Check-in
checkin.subtitle: Record your arrival and departure for each shift. Check-in opens 15 min before the start.
checkin.noShifts: You have no published shifts in the next few days.

today.title: Today
today.subtitle: Today's schedule for your restaurant, with each member's check-in/out status.
